tests.name: Filter Exclusion - Basic
tests.expected_behavior: All results must have color=red, no blue entities

tests.name: Filter Exclusion - Similarity Trap
tests.expected_behavior: Entity 2 (blue) with near-identical vector must be excluded

tests.name: Filter Exclusion - Multiple Conditions
tests.expected_behavior: All results must have color=red AND status=active

tests.name: Filter Exclusion - Set Membership
tests.expected_behavior: All results must have color IN [red, green]

tests.name: Filter Exclusion - Null Handling
tests.expected_behavior: Results must have status=NULL (should be empty or handle gracefully)

tests.name: Top-K Truncation - Full Filtered Subset
tests.expected_behavior: Return all 3 red entities (not 10 with 7 blue)

tests.name: Consistency - Distance Monotonicity
tests.expected_behavior: Distances are monotonically increasing within filtered entities

tests.name: Consistency - Different Top-K Values
tests.expected_behavior: Filter satisfaction and monotonicity with top_k=3

tests.name: Consistency - Exact Reference Comparison
tests.expected_behavior: Compare with exact ground truth (ALLOWED_DIFFERENCE for ANN)

tests.name: Empty Filter - Null Field Filter
tests.expected_behavior: Empty results or consistent error handling

tests.name: Empty Filter - Contradictory Condition
tests.expected_behavior: Empty results or consistent error handling
